action_text: Select "Short description" in the list search field selector
rationale: We need to filter by “Short description”; switching the list search field from Number to Short description aligns the search with the requirement.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-c8c8c533-7" into the list search box
rationale: After setting the field to Short description, entering the target token will filter the list to only entries containing the string.

action_text: Click the "Show / hide filter" button to open the filter builder
rationale: Using the advanced filter builder provides precise control to add a condition: Short description contains "#SERIES-c8c8c533-7".

action_text: Click "Show column search row" to display per-column filters
rationale: The column search row enables per-column filtering; showing it lets us enter the series value under the Short description column.

action_text: Open the "Short description" column options menu
rationale: Column options may offer quick filtering (e.g., Show Matching/Filter Out) based on a selected cell value; opening it could provide a fast path to filter by the series text.
